titlestmt.titleproper: Cornell University Law School Dean's office records18-1-75
titlestmt.author: Compiled by M. Moran

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2024-01-09 23:59:27 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: Undetermined, Code for undetermined script script.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Cornell University Law School Dean's office records
did.physdesc: Correspondence, lists, subject files, memoranda, budgets, inventories and other records.
did.abstract: Correspondence, lists, subject files, memoranda, budgets, inventories and other records of the Law School, with reference to students, scholarships, donors, professional law societies, and other matters connected with the operation of the Law School.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, lists, subject files, memoranda, budgets, inventories and other records of the Law School, with reference to students, scholarships, donors, professional law societies, and other matters connected with the operation and administration of the Law School.
Also, Law School Feasibility Study, Shepley Bulfinch Richardson and Abbott, Phase 1, 1983 and Phase 2, 1984 as part of #18-1-2554.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell Law School Dean's Office records, #18-1-75. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.

did.unittitle: he said " I want to use these funny quotes" Letterfile - School of Law
Scholarship Applications 1931-1932 Law Librarian Applications & Action Thereon
Applications for Scholarships 1934-1935 Loans, Students Librarianships and Rooms-Myron Taylor Hall
Applications for Scholarships and Financial Aid 1936-
Correspondence with College and Universities re Tuition Scholarships 1936-
Applications for Scholarships, Assistant Librarianships, and Rooms in Myron Taylor Hall 1937-
Applications for Scholarships, Loans, Librarianships, etc. 1938-
Correspondence with Students and Mr. Roqalsky re: Award of Scholarships, Loans, and Librarianships 1943-
Lecture Notes on "The History and Evolution of The Law" etc. , by Judge Francis M., Finch
Class Lists, Assignments to Faculty Advisors, Class Standings, Scholarships, Registration by Courses , Probation List 1931 -
Copies of Affidavits and Letters for Mr. Gibson
Copies of Affidavits and Letters for Mr. Gibson
First Year Students - Statements of Information, Affidavits, Letters
Second Year Students - Statements of Information, Affidavits, Letters
Second Year - Copies of Affidavits and Letters for Mr. Gibson
Requirements for Admission to the Bar -
Bar Exams and Legal Education, Joint Conf.
Myron Taylor Hall re: Building, Equipment, Furnishings, etc. 1928-
Law Officials - Alumni State of New York
Letters from Law Alumni re: Report
Inventory of Non-Student Files of Law School

American Association of Teachers of Journalism
American Committee for Guidance of Professional Personnel
American Institute of Comparative Law and Legislation
Arts College Conference ( esp. Robert Ferrari )
Association of American Law Schools (2 folders)

Automobiles, Report on Student Ownership of

Committee of Status of Extension Staff
Comparative Law Bureau of the American Bar Association
Congressional Committee of Reviaion of the Laws

Ellner, Josenh (re University of Michigan Legal Center)
Employment in Myron Taylor Hall, Applications

Evans, M. E. , Fargo, N.D. (2 items)
Georgetown University School of Law (invitation to 50th anniversary)

Illinois, Univ. of - College of Law
Inter- American Academy of Comparative and International Law

Judges, Law Alumni, State of New York
Law School Association, Committees on Bar Admission

National Commission on Law Observance and Enforcement
National Youth Administration - Student Aid- Univ. Placement Bureau
New York State Association of Judges at Children's Courts

New York State Conference on Legal Education

Radford, E. B. and Co. (2 items)

Sprague, George C. (Registrar of NYU - 2 items)
State Board of Law Examiners (New York)
Committee on Student Rooms, Myron Taylor Hall
